title: WA8 0PH, Feralco (UK) Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/WP3630WV/C004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Feralco (UK) Limited Installation name: Ferral Plant Permit number: EPR/WP3630WV/C004  "
